title: The Crew Faces the Heat
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on the crew faces the heat, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Crew Faces the Heat. The journey through the desert continues, mixing exhaustion, danger, and Vivi’s memories of the country she is trying to save. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: How dare that brat harm this king-dom's prin-cess!

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: Please forgive my son, your majesty!

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: I shall commit ritual suicide to stone for his sins!

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: It's nothing but a kids' fight, that's all!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Don't go easy on her just 'cause she's the princess, Kouza!

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: Yeah, teach that brathy princess a lesson!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Hey! Did you forget that Kouza's our leader!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: If I win, I'm your new leader!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'll have you know I've always been the leader back in my village.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Vivi's got herself some new friends.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: In order to govern Alabama well in the future...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: That's the most important thing she can have!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: And so is lgaram, captain of the Royal Guards.

summary: This part develops the crew faces the heat and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
